tasks.description: Create PlantSpecies type definition and plant-species.json knowledge base with 80 common houseplant entries (including briefDescription field for description pre-fill).

key_fields.PlantSpecies.names: Array of Chinese names and aliases for fuzzy matching
key_fields.PlantSpecies.briefDescription: One-sentence species description for з®Җд»Ӣ pre-fill (v1.1)

schema.relations: Frontend-only static JSON, no backend storage.
schema.notes: Data file ~50KB, bundled with frontend. Covers 5 categories: и§ӮеҸ¶(30) + еӨҡиӮү(20) + ејҖиҠұ(15) + иҚүжң¬и•Ёзұ»(10) + ж°ҙеҹ№(5). Each entry must have briefDescription (v1.1 required for з®Җд»Ӣйў„еЎ«).

data_layer.migration_strategy: No schema change. Frontend-only static data.

verification.data: JSON file parses correctly; all 80 entries match PlantSpecies interface; every entry has valid watering/light/fertilizing data and non-empty briefDescription.
verification.manual: Spot-check 10 species entries against gardening references for accuracy. Verify briefDescription is a meaningful one-sentence description.

acceptance_criteria: PlantSpecies interface includes briefDescription: string field.
plant-species.json contains >= 80 entries covering 5 plant categories.
Each entry has valid watering.intervalRange, light.level, fertilizing.intervalRange (no null or empty).
Each entry has a non-empty briefDescription string (used for з®Җд»Ӣйў„еЎ« per PRD В§3.3).
names array for each species includes common aliases.
JSON file passes TypeScript type validation via satisfies PlantSpecies[].

tasks.description: Add speciesId optional field to plants schema, extend createPlant and updatePlant mutations to accept and persist speciesId.

key_fields.speciesId: v.optional(v.string()) вҖ” species knowledge base ID

schema.relations: References PlantSpecies.id in frontend static JSON.

queries.write: createPlant: add optional speciesId; updatePlant: add optional speciesId (set/clear)

data_layer.migration_strategy: No data migration needed вҖ” v.optional backward compatible.

verification.auto: cd app && npm run typecheck && npx convex dev --once --typecheck enable
verification.data: Create plant with speciesId вҶ’ persisted. Create without вҶ’ undefined. Update вҶ’ persisted. Clear вҶ’ undefined.
verification.manual: Existing plants without speciesId load without errors.

acceptance_criteria: plantFields includes speciesId: v.optional(v.string()).
createPlant mutation accepts optional speciesId and writes it.
updatePlant mutation supports setting, changing, or clearing speciesId.
npx convex dev --once --typecheck enable passes.
Old plants without speciesId continue to work.

tasks.description: Implement matchSpecies pure function with priority-based matching (exact > prefix > contains), input length gate (2-50 chars), and unit tests.

schema.relations: Pure function, no data layer dependency.
schema.notes: matchSpecies(query, speciesList, maxResults=3). Trigger: 2 <= query.length <= 50. Priority: exact > prefix > contains. Case-insensitive.

verification.auto: cd app && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --testPathPattern=speciesMatch
verification.manual: matchSpecies('з»ҝиҗқ', list) вҶ’ з»ҝиҗқ first; matchSpecies('a', list) вҶ’ empty; matchSpecies('>50chars', list) вҶ’ empty.

acceptance_criteria: Returns empty when query.length < 2 or > 50.
Exact match ranked before prefix, prefix before contains.
Case-insensitive, works with Chinese and Latin names.
maxResults defaults to 3; never exceeds.
Unit tests cover: exact/prefix/contains priority, no match, case insensitivity, length gates, maxResults truncation.

tasks.description: Build SpeciesSuggestions component вҖ” autocomplete dropdown with candidate list micro-interactions (click flash, haptic, loading skeleton, silent empty dismiss), keyboard navigation, accessibility.

schema.notes: Absolute-positioned dropdown. Shared between create and edit pages.

design_contract.container: --color-surface bg, --radius-card 16px, 1px --color-line, --shadow-card, z-50, max-height calc(48px*3+2px), overflow hidden.
design_contract.item: 48px h, flex row, padding 0 var(--space-md), gap var(--space-sm). рҹӘҙ 16px + name 14px w600 --color-ink + difficulty colored + ' В· ' + category 12px --color-muted.
design_contract.loading_skeleton: 1 shimmer row after 200ms delay, 48px h, --color-mistвҶ’--color-surface gradient, 800ms loop.
design_contract.keyboard: ArrowUp/Down navigate, Enter selects, Escape closes.
design_contract.performance: 60fps, first match вүӨ250ms, max 3 DOM nodes.

verification.visual: Panel floats with shadow; 375px no overflow; difficulty colors correct; click flash visible; shimmer if JSON delayed.
verification.manual: Type 'з»ҝ' вҶ’ no panel. 'з»ҝиҗқ' вҶ’ panel. Arrow keys work. Enter selects. Click вҶ’ green flash вҶ’ panel exits. Long name вҶ’ ellipsis.

acceptance_criteria: Panel appears when matchSpecies returns >0 results (2-50 chars input).
Debounce 200ms on input.
Panel hides on blur after 200ms delay.
Item shows: рҹӘҙ + species name (ellipsis if long) + difficulty (colored) + category.
Click feedback: --color-leaf flash 50ms + haptic 10ms.
Loading skeleton after 200ms if JSON not loaded.
Empty result: silent dismiss, no text.
Keyboard: ArrowUp/Down, Enter, Escape.
a11y: listbox/option roles, aria-expanded, aria-live.
All token variables, no hex. reduced-motion: instant.
60fps, вүӨ250ms response, max 3 DOM nodes.

tasks.description: Build SpeciesRecommendCard вҖ” inline recommendation card with care grid, apply action (4-field pre-fill with conflict handling), stagger highlight, differentiated Toast, and dismiss action.

schema.notes: Mid-value: Math.ceil((min+max)/2). Pre-fill: watering/fertilizing always; description/notes only if empty.

design_contract.header: рҹҢҝ 18px + name Lora 16px w700 + difficulty pill + apply button (margin-left:auto).
design_contract.apply_button: --color-leaf bg, #fff 13px w600, 8px 16px, --radius-button, min-h 36px. Hover: --color-leaf-light + scale(0.97). Disabled: opacity 0.6.
design_contract.care_grid: 3-col flex, gap var(--space-sm). Each: flex-1, --color-surface bg, --radius-button, var(--space-sm) padding. emojiвҶ’labelвҶ’value(--color-leaf)вҶ’tip(ellipsis).
design_contract.prefill_rules: Watering: ceil((min+max)/2) always. Fertilizing: same. Description: '{category}пјҢ{briefDescription}гҖӮ{care.light.tip}' only if empty. Notes: 'еёёи§Ғй—®йўҳпјҡ{commonIssues[0]}гҖӮеҪ“еӯЈиҰҒзӮ№пјҡ{еҪ“еӯЈ}' only if empty.
design_contract.field_highlight: border-colorвҶ’--color-success, box-shadow 0 0 0 3px rgba(47,133,90,0.12), 300ms. Stagger 80ms between fields. Only filled fields highlighted.
design_contract.feedback_chain: 0ms:disable btn+exit start вҶ’ 250ms:collapsed вҶ’ 300ms:highlight stagger вҶ’ 350ms:toast вҶ’ 600ms:revert вҶ’ 700ms:focus next empty field.

verification.visual: Mist card, white sub-cards grid, leaf button right. Stagger highlight visible. <360px wraps.
verification.manual: Apply вҶ’ card exits вҶ’ fields filled (intervals always, desc/notes if empty) вҶ’ stagger highlight вҶ’ toast. Pre-filled desc: skip + different toast. Dismiss вҶ’ card exits вҶ’ no changes.

acceptance_criteria: Card shows species name (Lora), difficulty pill, 3-col care grid.
Care grid: watering/light/fertilizing with emojis and Chinese labels.
Light mapping: low=иҖҗйҳҙ, medium=ж•Је°„е…ү, bright=жҳҺдә®е…ү, direct=зӣҙе°„е…ү.
Apply pre-fills 4 fields with conflict handling (skip non-empty desc/notes).
Description format: '{category}пјҢ{briefDescription}гҖӮ{care.light.tip}'.
Notes format: 'еёёи§Ғй—®йўҳпјҡ{commonIssues[0]}гҖӮеҪ“еӯЈиҰҒзӮ№пјҡ{seasonalNotes.еҪ“еӯЈ}'.
Field highlight stagger 80ms (only filled fields).
Toast differentiates full vs partial pre-fill.
Focus moves to next empty field at 700ms.
Exit: 250ms (apply) / 200ms (dismiss).
<360px: grid wraps. All tokens, no hex. reduced-motion: instant.

tasks.description: Build CareKnowledgeSection (collapsible) and CareKnowledgeBlock for plant detail page вҖ” 5 knowledge blocks (watering/light/fertilizing/seasonal/issues), fallback state, integrate into PlantDetailPage.

schema.relations: Reads speciesId from plant, looks up PlantSpecies from frontend JSON.

design_contract.collapsed: --color-surface, --radius-card, 1px --color-line, 48px h. Left: рҹҢұ + 'е…»жҠӨжҢҮеҚ— В· {species}' 13px w600 --color-leaf-light. Right: Chevron 14px --color-muted. Hover: --color-mist bg 150ms.
design_contract.expanded: Content padding var(--space-sm) var(--space-md) var(--space-md), gap var(--space-sm). Separator 1px --color-line.
design_contract.block: --color-mist bg, --radius-button 12px. Title: emoji 16px + label 13px w600 --color-ink. Content: 13px w400 --color-muted, line-height 1.6.
design_contract.seasonal: Left border 3px --color-leaf-light. Season auto-detect by month.
design_contract.issues: Prefix ' В· ', line-height 1.8. вҡ пёҸ. Only if commonIssues.length > 0.
design_contract.collapse_anim: grid-template-rows 0frвҶ”1fr, expand 300ms ease-out / collapse 200ms ease-in. Chevron rotate 0вҶ”180deg 200ms.
design_contract.fallback: Non-collapsible, no chevron. 'рҹҢұ е…»жҠӨжҢҮеҚ—' title. 'жҡӮж— иҜҘе“Ғз§Қзҡ„е…»жҠӨжҢҮеҚ—' 14px centered. Sub: 'зј–иҫ‘жӨҚзү©иө„ж–ҷж—¶еҸҜе…іиҒ”е“Ғз§ҚпјҢиҺ·еҸ–е…»жҠӨе»әи®®' 12px centered.
design_contract.entry_anim: taskFadeSlideIn 360ms ease both, delay calc(80ms + index * 60ms).

verification.visual: Collapsed: one line with chevron. Expanded: 5 blocks. Fallback: centered gray text. 375px all readable.
verification.manual: Click expand вҶ’ grid-rows animation вҶ’ chevron rotates. Season auto by month. Fallback for no speciesId. JSON fail вҶ’ section absent.

acceptance_criteria: Renders between PlanSection and CareHistorySection.
Default collapsed, shows 'рҹҢұ е…»жҠӨжҢҮеҚ— В· {speciesName}' + chevron.
Expand/collapse: grid-template-rows animation, chevron rotates 180В°.
5 blocks: watering, light, fertilizing, seasonal, issues.
Seasonal auto-detects month. Issues only if commonIssues.length > 0.
Fallback (no speciesId or not found): non-collapsible placeholder.
JSON load failure: section not rendered.
Entry animation stagger. Token-only colors. reduced-motion skips.
aria-expanded, role=region, aria-label.

tasks.description: Build ConfirmedNameInput вҖ” species confirmed state for name input (background/border/icon/clear-button visual transition), shared between create and edit pages. Handles text completion, confirmedвҶ”normal state transitions.

schema.relations: UI-only state component wrapping name input.
schema.notes: Confirmed state = species selected. Normal state = free text input. Transition triggered by: select species (вҶ’confirmed), click Г—/modify text (вҶ’normal).

component_tree.entry_component: ConfirmedNameInput (or integrated into PlantForm name field)

design_contract.normal_state: bg: --color-surface, border-bottom: 1px --color-line, padding-left: var(--space-md), padding-right: var(--space-md), font-weight 400.
design_contract.confirmed_state: bg: --color-mist (#edf5f1), border-bottom: 2px --color-leaf, padding-left: calc(var(--space-md)+28px), padding-right: calc(var(--space-md)+32px), font-weight 600. Text = species names[0].
design_contract.left_icon: рҹҢҝ 18px, absolute left:var(--space-md) top:50% translateY(-50%). Enter: opacity 0вҶ’1 + scale(0.8вҶ’1) 150ms delay 50ms. Exit: opacityвҶ’0 100ms. aria-hidden=true.
design_contract.clear_button: Г— 16px SVG, color: --color-muted (default), --color-ink (hover), --color-error (active). 32Г—32 hit area, absolute right:var(--space-sm). --radius-pill bg on hover rgba(0,0,0,0.04). Enter: opacity 0вҶ’1 150ms delay 100ms. Exit: opacityвҶ’0 100ms. aria-label='еҸ–ж¶Ҳе“Ғз§Қе…іиҒ”'.
design_contract.text_completion: On select: input value immediately replaced with species names[0].
design_contract.state_entry_sequence: 0ms:panel disappears+text replaces вҶ’ 50ms:input style transitions вҶ’ 150ms:left icon fades in вҶ’ 200ms:clear button fades in вҶ’ confirmed ready.
design_contract.state_exit_sequence: 0ms:icon+clear start exit вҶ’ 100ms:gone вҶ’ 100ms:style transitions back вҶ’ 250ms:normal state.
design_contract.exit_triggers: Click Г— clear button, modify input text (type/paste/delete), programmatic clear.
design_contract.long_name: Confirmed text ellipsis, left icon and Г— never compressed (flex-shrink:0).

verification.visual: Select species вҶ’ input bg turns mist-green, border turns leaf-green 2px, рҹҢҝ appears left, Г— appears right, text is bold species name. Click Г— вҶ’ reverts. 375px: no overflow even with 15+ char name.
verification.manual: Select вҶ’ text completes to names[0]. Confirmed: modify text вҶ’ immediately exits confirmed state. Paste new text вҶ’ exits. Click Г— вҶ’ exits + speciesId cleared. Transitions 150ms smooth.

acceptance_criteria: Input transitions between normalвҶ”confirmed state per UI spec В§2.10.
Confirmed: bg --color-mist, border-bottom 2px --color-leaf, font-weight 600, paddings adjusted.
Text auto-completes to species names[0] on selection.
Left рҹҢҝ icon: absolute, 18px, enters with scale+opacity delay 50ms.
Right Г— button: 32px hit area, color states (muted/ink/error), enters delay 100ms.
Transition 150ms ease-out for all properties except font-weight (instant).
Exit triggers: click Г—, modify text, paste. All clear speciesId and revert to normal.
Long species names: text-overflow ellipsis, icons not compressed.
aria-label='еҸ–ж¶Ҳе“Ғз§Қе…іиҒ”' on Г— button. рҹҢҝ is aria-hidden.
reduced-motion: instant state changes, no animation.
Shared logic works for both create page and edit page.

tasks.description: Integrate SpeciesSuggestions, ConfirmedNameInput, and SpeciesRecommendCard into PlantForm/CreatePlantPage вҖ” full create-flow state machine (В§13.1) with species selection, confirmed state, apply logic, and speciesId persistence.

schema.relations: PlantForm manages species selection state; CreatePlantPage passes speciesId to createPlant.
schema.notes: State machine per UI spec В§13.1.

design_contract.name_input_container: position: relative for SpeciesSuggestions absolute positioning.
design_contract.recommend_card_position: Between name card group and description card group.
design_contract.select_flow: Click suggestion вҶ’ panel exits + text completes + input enters confirmed state (150ms) вҶ’ 200ms: recommend card enters (300ms).
design_contract.clear_flow: Click Г— or modify text вҶ’ confirmed exits вҶ’ recommend card removes вҶ’ if textвүҘ2 chars: re-match.
design_contract.apply_flow: Click apply вҶ’ card exits вҶ’ stagger highlight вҶ’ toast вҶ’ focus next empty.
design_contract.dismiss_flow: Click dismiss вҶ’ card exits вҶ’ no field changes, speciesId retained.

verification.data: Create plant with species вҶ’ speciesId written. Without вҶ’ undefined.
verification.visual: Full flow: inputвҶ’matchвҶ’select(confirmed state)вҶ’recommend cardвҶ’applyвҶ’highlightвҶ’toast. All at 375px.
verification.manual: Full state machine: all В§13.1 transitions verified. After select: modify name вҶ’ re-trigger. After apply: fields filled + speciesId. After dismiss: no field change + speciesId retained.

acceptance_criteria: PlantForm integrates ConfirmedNameInput, SpeciesSuggestions, SpeciesRecommendCard.
State machine implements all В§13.1 transitions.
Select species: panel exits вҶ’ text completes вҶ’ confirmed state вҶ’ card enters.
Apply: card exits вҶ’ 4-field pre-fill вҶ’ stagger highlight вҶ’ toast вҶ’ focus.
Dismiss: card exits, no field changes, speciesId retained.
Clear (Г— or edit text): confirmed exits, card removes, re-match if вүҘ2 chars.
speciesId passed to createPlant on submit.
Rapid re-selection: last selection wins, no residual state.
375px: all components fit without overflow.

tasks.description: Build SpeciesTag and integrate into EditPlantPage вҖ” confirmed state on load, tag display, remove/re-associate flow, cancel-association Toast, no recommend card on edit page. Full В§13.3 state machine.

key_fields.speciesId: Read from plant, updated via updatePlant on save

schema.relations: SpeciesTag reads species info from JSON by speciesId. EditPlantPage calls updatePlant with new/cleared speciesId.
schema.notes: No SpeciesRecommendCard on edit page. ConfirmedNameInput + SpeciesTag + SpeciesSuggestions.

design_contract.tag: inline-flex, align-items center, gap var(--space-xs). --color-mist bg, --radius-pill, padding 4px 8px 4px 10px. margin-top var(--space-xs).
design_contract.tag_content: рҹӘҙ 14px вҶ’ species name 12px w500 --color-leaf вҶ’ ' В· ' 12px --color-muted вҶ’ difficulty text 12px w400 (colored) вҶ’ вң• 14px --color-muted, 28Г—28 hit area.
design_contract.initial_load_sequence: 0ms:skeleton вҶ’ data loaded:text fills вҶ’ +50ms:confirmed state вҶ’ +100ms:tag enters.
design_contract.cancel_triggers: Click tag вң• OR click input Г— clear button вҶ’ both clear speciesId + exit confirmed + tag exits + toast.
design_contract.re_match_flow: After cancel, if textвүҘ2 chars вҶ’ debounce 200ms вҶ’ suggestions appear вҶ’ select вҶ’ confirmed state + new tag (no recommend card).
design_contract.state_machine: Per В§13.3: loaded(confirmed+tag) вҶ’ cancel(normal, toast) вҶ’ re-match вҶ’ select(confirmed+new tag) вҶ’ save.
design_contract.a11y: Tag Г— aria-label='еҸ–ж¶Ҳе…іиҒ”е“Ғз§Қ'. Input Г— aria-label='еҸ–ж¶Ҳе“Ғз§Қе…іиҒ”'.

verification.data: Edit plant with speciesId вҶ’ tag shown. Remove вҶ’ save вҶ’ cleared. Re-associate вҶ’ save вҶ’ new speciesId.
verification.visual: Pill tag with mist bg. вң• red on hover. Confirmed input on load. 375px fits.
verification.manual: Full В§13.3: load вҶ’ confirmed+tag вҶ’ click вң• вҶ’ normal+toast вҶ’ modify name вҶ’ match вҶ’ select вҶ’ new confirmed+tag вҶ’ save. Also: speciesId not in JSON вҶ’ normal state, no tag.

acceptance_criteria: SpeciesTag: pill shape, --color-mist bg, рҹӘҙ + name + difficulty + вң•.
вң• hover: --color-error + scale(1.1). Click clears speciesId.
Tag enter/exit: scale+opacity 150ms/120ms.
Edit page loads with confirmed state if plant has speciesId.
Load sequence: data вҶ’ confirmed input вҶ’ tag enters (+100ms stagger).
Cancel (tag вң• or input Г—): speciesId cleared + confirmed exits + tag exits + Toast 'е·ІеҸ–ж¶Ҳе“Ғз§Қе…іиҒ”' 2s.
After cancel: if nameвүҘ2 chars вҶ’ re-match вҶ’ select new species вҶ’ confirmed + new tag.
No SpeciesRecommendCard on edit page ever.
updatePlant called with speciesId on save.
speciesId not found in JSON: normal state, no tag, allow re-match.
В§13.3 state machine fully implemented.

tasks.description: End-to-end verification вҖ” TypeScript compilation, unit tests, Convex type check, full-flow validation across create/detail/edit pages, confirmed state transitions, pre-fill scenarios, backward compatibility, accessibility and performance audit.

schema.relations: Verification task, no new data layer changes.
schema.notes: Covers all KNOW-001~009 deliverables including v1.1 additions.

verification.auto: cd app && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npx convex dev --once --typecheck enable
verification.data: Create plant with speciesId вҶ’ detail shows knowledge card вҶ’ edit shows confirmed+tag вҶ’ clear speciesId вҶ’ detail shows fallback. Old plants load without errors.
verification.visual: All 25 visual acceptance items from UI spec В§15 verified at 375px width.
verification.manual: 1) Create: inputвҶ’matchвҶ’select(confirmed state+text complete)вҶ’recommendвҶ’apply(4-field+stagger+toast)вҶ’saveвҶ’speciesId. 2) Create partial: description pre-filledвҶ’applyвҶ’skip desc+different toast. 3) Detail: collapse/expand, season correct, fallback. 4) Edit: load confirmed+tagвҶ’remove(toast)вҶ’re-matchвҶ’selectвҶ’save. 5) Backward compat: old plants no error. 6) JSON load fail: create flow normal. 7) Confirmed state: modify textвҶ’exits. 8) Performance: first match вүӨ250ms, 60fps. 9) A11y: listbox, aria-expanded, contrast вүҘ4.5:1. 10) reduced-motion: all animations instant.

acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck passes with zero new errors.
npm run test passes with zero new test failures.
npx convex dev --once --typecheck enable passes.
Create page full path including confirmed state and 4-field pre-fill.
Create page partial pre-fill (skip non-empty fields) with correct Toast.
Confirmed state: text completes, visual changes, Г— clears, edit text clears.
Detail page knowledge card: expand/collapse, content correct, season auto.
Detail page fallback: plants without speciesId show placeholder.
Edit page: confirmed state on load, tag visible, cancelвҶ’toastвҶ’re-matchвҶ’save.
Edit page: no recommend card ever shown.
Backward compat: old plants without speciesId load without errors.
Species JSON load failure: all pages degrade gracefully.
375px width: all components display without overflow.
All colors use CSS token variables, zero hardcoded hex.
prefers-reduced-motion: all animations skip.
Performance: first match вүӨ250ms, panel animations 60fps.
Accessibility: listbox, aria-expanded, aria-label, contrast вүҘ4.5:1.
Field highlight stagger working (80ms intervals, only filled fields).
Candidate click feedback (flash + haptic) working.
All 25 items from UI spec В§15 acceptance criteria pass.
